---
title: "Lymphoma_obesity_analysis"
author: "Christelle Colin-Leitzinger"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_collapsed: false
    theme: united
    highlight: pygments
    df_print: kable
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE,
                      warning = FALSE,
                      message = FALSE,
                      cache = FALSE,
                      fig.align='center'
                      )
```

```{r library, echo = FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(labelled)
library(gtsummary)
library(gt)
library(survminer)
library(survival)
theme_gtsummary_compact()
theme_set(theme_classic())
```

<style>
div.darkblue { background-color:#0099CC; border-radius: 5px; padding: 20px; font-size: 38px}
</style>
<div class = "blue">

<span style="color: white;">CH in Lymphoma and obesity analysis</span>

</div>
<br>

```{r load}
lymphoma_data <- read_rds(paste0(here::here(), 
                            "/data/processed data",
                            "/Lymphoma_Data_20251104.rds")) %>% 
  select(-ch_status)
path <- fs::path("", "Volumes", "Gillis_Research",
                 "Lab_Data", "LymphomaObesity")
sample_list <- 
  readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(# path,
    here::here(), "/data/raw data",
    "/Lymphoma_Shipping Manifest_EXP2052DNA_PHI_20240504.xlsx"), 
    sheet = "Shipping Manifest_w PHI") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()
ch_mutation <- 
  readxl::read_xlsx(paste0(# path,
    here::here(), "/data/raw data",
    "/Lymphoma_CHcalls_20260417.xlsx"), 
    na = "NA") %>% 
  janitor::clean_names()
```

```{r}
lymphoma_data <- lymphoma_data %>% 
  mutate(race = factor(race, levels = c("White", "Other"))) %>% 
  mutate(ethnicity_src_desc = na_if(ethnicity_src_desc, "UNKNOWN"))

lymphoma_data <- lymphoma_data %>% 
  # Index
  mutate(across(c(ends_with("_cm2")
                  ), ~ . / (height_m ^2), 
                .names = "{.col}_index")) %>% 
  rename(smi = muscle_cm2_index) %>% 
  # Sarcopenia
  mutate(sarcopenia = case_when(
    sex == "Female" &
      smi >= 38.5                         ~ "≥ cutoff",
    sex == "Female" &
      smi < 38.5                          ~ "Sarcopenia",
    sex == "Male" &
      smi >= 52.4                         ~ "≥ cutoff",
    sex == "Male" &
      smi < 52.4                          ~ "Sarcopenia"
  )) %>%
  # Myosteatosis - skeletal muscle fat infiltration
  mutate(myosteatosis = case_when(
    bmi < 25 &
      muscle_hu < 41                      ~ "Myosteatosis",
    bmi >= 25 &
      muscle_hu < 33                      ~ "Myosteatosis",
    !is.na(muscle_hu) &
      !is.na(bmi)                         ~ "No myosteatosis"
  ), myosteatosis = factor(myosteatosis, levels = c("No myosteatosis", "Myosteatosis"))) %>%
  # TAT
  mutate(tat_cm2 = case_when(
    is.na(vat_cm2) |
    is.na(sat_cm2) |
    is.na(imat_cm2)                       ~ NA_real_,
    TRUE                                  ~ vat_cm2 + sat_cm2 + imat_cm2
  )) %>% 
  mutate(tat_cm2_index = case_when(
    is.na(vat_cm2_index) |
    is.na(sat_cm2_index) |
    is.na(imat_cm2_index)                 ~ NA_real_,
    TRUE                                  ~ vat_cm2_index + sat_cm2_index + imat_cm2_index
  )) %>% 
  # V/S ratio
  mutate(v_s_ratio = vat_cm2 / sat_cm2) %>% 
  mutate(visceral_obesity = case_when(
    v_s_ratio > 0.4                       ~ "Viscerally obese",
    !is.na(v_s_ratio)                     ~ "Not viscerally obese"
  )) %>% 
  # Proportion - remove the values if one feature is NA
  mutate(muscle_proportion = muscle_cm2 / 
           (muscle_cm2 + vat_cm2 +
              sat_cm2 + imat_cm2)) %>% 
  mutate(vat_proportion = vat_cm2 / 
           (muscle_cm2 + vat_cm2 +
              sat_cm2 + imat_cm2)) %>% 
  mutate(sat_proportion = sat_cm2 / 
           (muscle_cm2 + vat_cm2 +
              sat_cm2 + imat_cm2)) %>% 
  mutate(imat_proportion = imat_cm2 / 
           (muscle_cm2 + vat_cm2 +
              sat_cm2 + imat_cm2)) %>% 
  # mutate(muscle_proportionindex = smi / 
  #          (smi + vat_cm2_index +
  #             sat_cm2_index + imat_cm2_index)) %>% 
  # mutate(vat_proportionindex = vat_cm2_index / 
  #          (smi + vat_cm2_index +
  #             sat_cm2_index + imat_cm2_index)) %>% 
  # mutate(sat_proportionindex = sat_cm2_index / 
  #          (smi + vat_cm2_index +
  #             sat_cm2_index + imat_cm2_index)) %>% 
  # mutate(imat_proportionindex = imat_cm2_index / 
  #          (smi + vat_cm2_index +
  #             sat_cm2_index + imat_cm2_index)) %>% 
  mutate(across(c(contains("_proportion")), ~ case_when(
    is.na(muscle_cm2) |
    is.na(vat_cm2) |
    is.na(sat_cm2) |
    is.na(imat_cm2)                    ~ NA_real_,
    TRUE                               ~ .
  )))

lymphoma_data <- lymphoma_data %>% 
  # Make categorical var
  mutate(across(c(smi, ends_with("_index"),
                  "muscle_hu",
                  "vat_cm2", "sat_cm2", "imat_cm2",
                  "tat_cm2",
                  "v_s_ratio",
                  contains("_proportion")
                  ), ~ case_when(
    ntile(., 3) == 1 ~ "Low",
    ntile(., 3) == 2 ~ "Medium",
    ntile(., 3) == 3 ~ "High"),
    .names = "{.col}_tertcat")) %>% 
  mutate(across(c(ends_with("_tertcat")), 
                ~ factor(., levels = 
                           c("Low", "Medium", "High"))))

lymphoma_data <- lymphoma_data %>% 
  # Make 1-standard deviation increase of the feature
  mutate(across(c("muscle_hu", "muscle_cm2",
                  "vat_cm2", "sat_cm2", "imat_cm2",
                  "tat_cm2"#,
                  # contains("_proportion")
                  ), ~ . / sd(., na.rm = TRUE) , .names = "{.col}_sdhr"))

lymphoma_data <- lymphoma_data %>% 
  # Make 1-standard deviation increase of the height indexed feature
  mutate(across(c("smi",
                  "vat_cm2_index", "sat_cm2_index", "imat_cm2_index",
                  "tat_cm2_index"#,
                  # contains("_proportion")
                  ), ~ . / sd(., na.rm = TRUE) , .names = "{.col}sdhr"))

lymphoma_data <- lymphoma_data %>% 
  # Make 1-standard deviation increase of the height indexed feature
  mutate(across(c(contains("_proportion") & where(is.numeric)
                  ), ~ . / sd(., na.rm = TRUE) , .names = "{.col}sdhr"))
```

```{r}
ch_mutation <- ch_mutation %>% 
  inner_join(sample_list %>%
              select(source_sample_id, mrn) %>%
              distinct(), .,
            by = "source_sample_id") %>%
  mutate(mrn = as.character(mrn)) %>%
  mutate(patient_l_ch = case_when(
    l_ch == "TRUE"                     ~ "L-CH"
  )) %>% 
  group_by(mrn) %>%
  mutate(number_of_mutation_per_patient = case_when(
    is.na(gene)                        ~ NA_real_,
    TRUE                               ~ n()
  )) %>% 
  fill(patient_l_ch, .direction = "updown") %>% 
  ungroup()

library(fastDummies)
ch_mutation1 <- ch_mutation %>% 
  filter(!is.na(gene)) %>% 
  select(mrn, number_of_mutation_per_patient, gene, variant_p) %>% 
  unite(mutation_variant, c(gene, variant_p)) %>%
  distinct()

mutation_variant_wide <- dummy_cols(.data = ch_mutation1, select_columns = "mutation_variant",
                                    remove_selected_columns = TRUE,
                                    omit_colname_prefix = FALSE, ignore_na = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(mrn, number_of_mutation_per_patient) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum)) %>%
  ungroup()

ch_mutation1 <- ch_mutation %>% 
  filter(!is.na(gene)) %>% 
  select(mrn, mutation_gene = gene) %>% 
  distinct()

mutation_gene_wide <- dummy_cols(.data = ch_mutation1, select_columns = "mutation_gene",
                                    remove_selected_columns = TRUE,
                                    omit_colname_prefix = FALSE, ignore_na = TRUE) %>%
  group_by(mrn) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), sum)) %>%
  ungroup()

lymphoma_data <- lymphoma_data %>%
  inner_join(., ch_mutation %>% 
               select(mrn, ch_status, patient_l_ch) %>% 
               distinct(), 
             by = "mrn") %>%
  full_join(., mutation_variant_wide, by = "mrn") %>%
  full_join(., mutation_gene_wide, by = "mrn") %>%
  mutate(across(c(starts_with("mutation_variant") | 
                    starts_with("mutation_gene")
                  ), .fns = ~ replace_na(., 0))) %>% 
  mutate(ch_status = factor(ch_status, levels = c("No CH", "CH")))
```

```{r Labeling data}
var_label(lymphoma_data) <- list(age_at_diagnosis_num = "Patient age",
                                 sex = "Sex",
                                 race_cr_src_desc_1	 = "Race (raw)",
                                 race = "Race", ethnicity_src_desc = "Ethnicity",
                                 histology_desc = "Histology",
                                 bmi = "BMI (kg/m², continuous)",
                                 bmi_cat = "BMI (kg/m², categorical)",
                                 bsa_du_bois = "BSA (Dubois formula)",
                                 bsa_cat = "BSA (categorical)",
                                 weight_kg = "Weight (kg)",
                                 height_m = "Height (m)",
                                 
                                 v_s_ratio = "V/S ratio",
                                 visceral_obesity = "Visceral obesity",
                                 tat_cm2 = "TAT",
                                 smi = "SMI",
                                 sarcopenia = "Sarcopenia",
                                 vat_cm2_index = "VAT (index)",
                                 sat_cm2_index = "SAT (index)",
                                 imat_cm2_index = "IMAT (index)",
                                 tat_cm2_index = "TAT (index)",
                                 muscle_proportion = "Muscle proportion",
                                 vat_proportion = "VAT proportion",
                                 sat_proportion = "SAT proportion",
                                 imat_proportion = "IMAT proportion",
                                 
                                 smisdhr = "SMI",
                                 vat_cm2_indexsdhr = "VAT (index)",
                                 sat_cm2_indexsdhr = "SAT (index)",
                                 imat_cm2_indexsdhr = "IMAT (index)",
                                 tat_cm2_indexsdhr = "TAT (index)",
                                 muscle_proportionsdhr = "Muscle proportion",
                                 vat_proportionsdhr = "VAT proportion",
                                 sat_proportionsdhr = "SAT proportion",
                                 imat_proportionsdhr = "IMAT proportion",
                                 
                                 os_event = "Deaths",
                                 # os_time_from_treatment_months = "Follow-up time from treatment (months)",
                                 ch_status = "CH status"
)
```



# I. Patient characteristic by CH status
```{r Patient characteristics}
lymphoma_data %>%
  select(age_at_diagnosis_num,
         sex, 
         race, race_cr_src_desc_1, 
         ethnicity_src_desc,
         # stage_combined,
         histology_desc, 
         `survival time (months, Registry)` = survival_time_in_months,
         os_time_from_treatment_months, os_event,
         bmi, bmi_cat, bsa_du_bois, bsa_cat,
         weight_kg, height_m,
         ch_status
         ) %>%
  tbl_summary(by = ch_status,
              statistic = list(os_time_from_treatment_months ~ 
                                 "{median} [{min}-{max}] ({p25}, {p75})"),
              digits = list(all_continuous() ~ 1)) %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  add_p() %>% bold_p(t = 0.05) %>% add_overall() %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**Patient characteristics**",
                all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")
```

# II. BMI, Survival and Body composition
It was described that BMI is not the best predictor for survival. While we would expect patients present in the highest BMI group (≥30) to have the worse survival, they often show a better survival than patient within the middle BMI group (≥25 - <30).
```{r KM OS BMI}
ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(os_time_from_treatment_months, os_event) ~ bmi_cat,
                   data = lymphoma_data),
           # title = "PFS Analysis",
           font.main = c(20, "bold", "black"),
           font.x = c(18, "bold", "black"),
           font.y = c(18, "bold", "black"),
           font.legend = c(16, "black"),
           font.tickslab = c(16, "bold", "black"),
           size = 1.5,
           palette = c("#000004FF", "#8C2981FF", "#FE9F6DFF"), #"aaas",
           xlab = "Time (months)",
           legend = "top",
           pval = TRUE,
           conf.int = FALSE,
           # Censor
           censor = TRUE
) %++% guides(colour = guide_legend(ncol = 1))

coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ bmi_cat,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**Survival association with BMI**")
```

Also, BMI is not the best representation of the actual body composition.   
For example, in our cohort, the highest median value for muscle HU (radiodensity) belong to the patients in the middle BMI category (≥25 - <30).
SAT values are similar between these patients and patients in the high BMI category (≥30).
```{r Body composition plot, fig.height=5}
lymphoma_data %>% 
  select(mrn,
         muscle_cm2, imat_cm2, vat_cm2, sat_cm2, 
         muscle_hu,
         bmi_cat
         ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(bmi_cat)) %>% 
  pivot_longer(-c(mrn, bmi_cat)) %>% 
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("muscle_hu", "muscle_cm2", 
                                        "vat_cm2", "sat_cm2", "imat_cm2"))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x= bmi_cat, y= value, color = bmi_cat))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  labs(x = "BMI (categories)", y = "Body composition values")+
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "A", end = c(0.8))+
  theme_classic()+
  coord_flip()+
  # facet_grid(cols = vars(name), scales = "free")
  facet_wrap(.~ name, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```

# III. Body composition features by CH status

Most patients (82) have thickness of 3.75 which is often used for Pet/CT so this looks normal. A couple of patient have smaller thickness and 12 have higher thickness value.   

<br>

Dan suggested to :   
- Calculate indexed feature (variables need to be divided by height^2).  
- Look at sarcopenia (sarcopenia was defined as muscle indexed [SMI] < 52.4 cm2/m2 for males and SMI < 38.5 cm2/m2 for females).   
- Look at muscle_hu are Hounsfield unit and measure radiodensity. It is important in case of oedema, scaring. It is muscle radiomics, it reflect the muscle quality.    
- Calculate V/S ratio which is VAT divided by SAT.  
- Visceral obesity category (visceral obese have a V/S ratio > 0.4).  
- Calculate TAT or total fat tissue (VAT+SAT+IMAT).   
- Calculate tissue proportion (for variable A, we divide variable A by the sum of all the tissue combined muscle+VAT+SAT+IMAT).   
Another thing done in papers is that they used 1-standard deviation increase (z-score) of the feature in the Cox regression model.

<br>

```{r Body composition table}
tbl_raw <- lymphoma_data %>%
  select(muscle_cm2, imat_cm2, vat_cm2, sat_cm2, 
         muscle_hu, myosteatosis,
         v_s_ratio, visceral_obesity, tat_cm2,
         # ends_with("_tertcat"),
         # imat_hu, vat_hu, sat_hu,
         # muscle_sd, imat_sd, vat_sd,
         # sat_sd,
         ch_status
         ) %>%
  tbl_summary(by = ch_status,
              statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} [{sd}] ({p25}, {p75})", 
                               all_categorical() ~"{n} ({p}%)"),
              digits = list(all_continuous() ~ 1)) %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  add_p() %>% bold_p(t = 0.05) %>% add_overall() %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**Body composition**",
                all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")

# tbl_sdhr <- lymphoma_data %>%
#   select(ends_with("_sdhr"), 
#          ch_status
#          ) %>%
#   tbl_summary(by = ch_status,
#               statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} ({p25}, {p75})", 
#                                all_categorical() ~"{n} ({p}%)")) %>%
#   bold_labels() %>%
#   add_p() %>% bold_p(t = 0.05) %>% add_overall() %>% 
#   modify_header(label ~ "**Body composition**",
#                 all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")

tbl_index <- lymphoma_data %>%
  select(smi, sarcopenia,
         vat_cm2_index, sat_cm2_index, imat_cm2_index, tat_cm2_index, 
         ch_status
         ) %>%
  tbl_summary(by = ch_status,
              statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} [{sd}] ({p25}, {p75})", 
                               all_categorical() ~"{n} ({p}%)"),
              digits = list(all_continuous() ~ 1)) %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  add_p() %>% bold_p(t = 0.05) %>% add_overall() %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**Body composition**",
                all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")

# tbl_indexsdhr <- lymphoma_data %>%
#   select(ends_with("_indexsdhr"), 
#          ch_status
#          ) %>%
#   tbl_summary(by = ch_status,
#               statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} [{sd}] ({p25}, {p75})", 
#                                all_categorical() ~"{n} ({p}%)")) %>%
#   bold_labels() %>%
#   add_p() %>% bold_p(t = 0.05) %>% add_overall() %>% 
#   modify_header(label ~ "**Body composition**",
#                 all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")

tbl_prop <- lymphoma_data %>%
  select(ends_with("_proportion"),
         ch_status
         ) %>%
  tbl_summary(by = ch_status,
              statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} [{sd}] ({min}, {max})", 
                               all_categorical() ~"{n} ({p}%)")) %>%
  bold_labels() %>%
  add_p() %>% bold_p(t = 0.05) %>% add_overall() %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**Body composition**",
                all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")

# tbl_propindex <- lymphoma_data %>% # Using height indexed values generate more missing data if height is NA
#   select(ends_with("_proportionindex"),
#          ch_status
#          ) %>%
#   tbl_summary(by = ch_status,
#               statistic = list(all_continuous() ~ "{median} [{sd}] ({min}, {max})",
#                                all_categorical() ~"{n} ({p}%)")) %>%
#   bold_labels() %>%
#   add_p() %>% bold_p(t = 0.05) %>% add_overall() %>%
#   modify_header(label ~ "**Body composition**",
#                 all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")
```


```{r gt table}
gt_tbl <- tbl_stack(list(tbl_raw, tbl_index, tbl_prop), 
                    group_header = c("Raw features", 
                                     "Indexed features", 
                                     "Tissue proportion")) %>%
  as_gt(#rownames_to_stub = TRUE
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_options(row_group.border.top.color = "black",
                  row_group.border.top.width = 3,
                  row_group.border.bottom.color = "darkgrey",
                  row_group.font.size = 15,
                  row_group.font.weight = "bold",
                  row_group.text_transform = "uppercase",
                  row_group.background.color = "grey")
gt_tbl
```

I plotted the original features by CH status. Will update once we figure out the best features to show.
```{r Body composition plot by CH, fig.height=4}
lymphoma_data %>% 
  select(mrn,
         muscle_cm2, imat_cm2, vat_cm2, sat_cm2, 
         muscle_hu,
         bmi_cat,
         ch_status
         ) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(mrn, bmi_cat, ch_status)) %>% 
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("muscle_hu", "muscle_cm2", 
                                        "vat_cm2", "sat_cm2", "imat_cm2"))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x= ch_status, y= value, color = ch_status))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  labs(x = "CH status", y = "Body composition values")+
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "G", end = c(0.8))+
  theme_classic()+
  coord_flip()+
  # facet_grid(cols = vars(name), scales = "free")
  facet_wrap(.~ name, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

lymphoma_data %>% 
  select(mrn,
         ends_with("_proportion"),
         muscle_hu,
         bmi_cat,
         ch_status
         ) %>%
  pivot_longer(-c(mrn, bmi_cat, ch_status)) %>% 
  mutate(name = case_when(
    name == "muscle_hu"                    ~ "Muscle density (HU)", 
    name == "muscle_proportion"            ~ "Muscle proportion",
    name == "vat_proportion"               ~ "VAT proportion", 
    name == "sat_proportion"               ~ "SAT proportion", 
    name == "imat_proportion"              ~ "IMAT proportion"
  )) %>% 
  mutate(name = factor(name, levels = c("Muscle density (HU)", "Muscle proportion",
                                        "VAT proportion", "SAT proportion", 
                                        "IMAT proportion"))) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x= ch_status, y= value, color = ch_status))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  labs(x = NULL, y = "Body composition measure")+
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "G", end = c(0.8))+
  theme_classic()+
  coord_flip()+
  # facet_grid(cols = vars(name), scales = "free")
  facet_wrap(.~ name, scales = "free", ncol = 2)+
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# ggsave("Figures/Figure S2 Distribution of body composition features by CH status_20260407.jpeg",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 7,
#        height = 6
#        )
```


# IV. CH and Body composition - glm logistic regression
In the CH table, some feature distributions seems to be different.   
IMAT, VAT for indexed features, and VAT, SAT for abdominal proportion (trend pvalue > 0.05 & < 0.1, only VAT abdominal pvalue < 0.05).

## 1. Regression for association with CH status
### Clinical
```{r CH clinical regression}
glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race + race,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
```

### BMI
https://ashpublications.org/blood/article/144/Supplement%201/872/531065/Mutation-Specific-Differences-in-the-Relationship
In UKBB analyses, we identified genotype-specific patterns of association between BMI and the presence of CH mutations. JAK2 (OR 0.51; 95% CI 0.27-0.96; p=0.036) and DNMT3A mutations (OR 0.92; 95% CI 0.87-0.97; p=0.0028) were negatively associated with a BMI >30 relative to BMI <25, whereas mutations in ASXL1(OR 1.40; 95% CI 1.23-1.60; p=8.8x10-7) and TET2 (OR 1.16; 95% CI 1.04-1.31; p=0.0095) were positively associated with BMI >30.

```{r}
glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race + race + bmi,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
glm(ch_status ~
      bmi,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race + race + bmi_cat,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
glm(ch_status ~
      bmi_cat,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
```

### Association with height-indexed body composition features
Association estimates are reported per 1-SD increase in the body composition metric.   
VAT and IMAT show a trend toward a positive association with the presence of CH mutations.   
Additional adjustment for Age and Sex show similar results.
#### UVA
```{r}
# glm(ch_status ~
#       # age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
#           smi + vat_cm2_index + sat_cm2_index + imat_cm2_index,
#     family = "binomial",
#     data = lymphoma_data) %>%
#   tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
#                  intercept = TRUE) %>%
#   modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_muscle_ind <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
          smisdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_muscle_ind
tbl_ch_vat_ind <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_vat_ind
tbl_ch_sat_ind <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_sat_ind
tbl_ch_imat_ind <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
          imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_imat_ind
# glm(ch_status ~
#           v_s_ratio_tertcat,
#     family = "binomial",
#     data = lymphoma_data) %>%
#   tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
#                  intercept = TRUE) %>%
#   modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")

# glm(ch_status ~
#           tat_cm2,
#     family = "binomial",
#     data = lymphoma_data) %>%
#   tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
#                  intercept = TRUE) %>%
#   modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
```

#### MVA
```{r}
tbl_ch_muscle_ind_mva <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          smisdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_muscle_ind_mva
tbl_ch_vat_ind_mva <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_vat_ind_mva
tbl_ch_sat_ind_mva <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_sat_ind_mva
tbl_ch_imat_ind_mva <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_imat_ind_mva
```


### Association with body composition proportion
Association estimates are reported per 1-SD increase in the body composition metric.   
Additional adjustment for Age and Sex exhibit similar results.
#### UVA
```{r}
# glm(ch_status ~
#       # age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
#           muscle_proportion + vat_proportion + sat_proportion + imat_proportion,
#     family = "binomial",
#     data = lymphoma_data) %>%
#   tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
#                  intercept = TRUE) %>%
#   modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_muscle_prop <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
          muscle_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_muscle_prop
tbl_ch_vat_prop <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
          vat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_vat_prop
tbl_ch_sat_prop <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
          sat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_sat_prop
tbl_ch_imat_prop <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
          imat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_imat_prop
# glm(ch_status ~
#       age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
#           muscle_proportion_tertcat + vat_proportion_tertcat + sat_proportion_tertcat + imat_proportion_tertcat,
#     family = "binomial",
#     data = lymphoma_data) %>%
#   tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
#                  intercept = TRUE) %>%
#   modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
```

#### MVA
```{r}
tbl_ch_muscle_prop_mva <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          muscle_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_muscle_prop_mva
tbl_ch_vat_prop_mva <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          vat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_vat_prop_mva
tbl_ch_sat_prop_mva <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          sat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_sat_prop_mva
tbl_ch_imat_prop_mva <- 
  glm(ch_status ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          imat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for CH status")
tbl_ch_imat_prop_mva
```

## 2. Regression for association with CH gene mutations
### a. Count table
```{r}
lymphoma_data %>%
  select(number_of_mutation_per_patient, starts_with("mutation_gene")) %>%
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "mutation_gene_")) %>% 
  tbl_summary() %>%
  bold_labels() %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**CH mutations**",
                all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")
```

### b. BMI
#### UVA
```{r}
glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      bmi,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for DNMT3A mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      bmi_cat,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for DNMT3A mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      bmi,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for PPM1D mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      bmi_cat,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for PPM1D mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      bmi,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for TET2 mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      bmi_cat,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for TET2 mutation")
```

#### MVA
```{r}
glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~ age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
      bmi,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for DNMT3A mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~ age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
      bmi_cat,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for DNMT3A mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~ age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
      bmi,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for PPM1D mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~ age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
      bmi_cat,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for PPM1D mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~ age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
      bmi,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for TET2 mutation")
glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~ age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
      bmi_cat,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for TET2 mutation")
```

### c. Association with height-indexed body composition features
Association estimates are reported per 1-SD increase in the body composition metric.   
Mutations in DNMT3A (OR 1.59) seem to be positively associated with higher VAT.
#### UVA
```{r}
tbl_dnmt3a_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
          smisdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for DNMT3A mutation")
tbl_dnmt3a_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_dnmt3a_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_dnmt3a_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
          imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_ppm1d_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
          smisdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for PPM1D mutation")
tbl_ppm1d_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_ppm1d_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_ppm1d_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
          imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_tet2_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
          smisdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for TET2 mutation")
tbl_tet2_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_tet2_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_tet2_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
          imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_muscle <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_muscle, tbl_ppm1d_muscle, tbl_tet2_muscle), 
                        tab_spanner = c("Regression for DNMT3A mutation", 
                                        "Regression for PPM1D mutation", 
                                        "Regression for TET2 mutation"))
tbl_vat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_vat, tbl_ppm1d_vat, tbl_tet2_vat))
tbl_sat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_sat, tbl_ppm1d_sat, tbl_tet2_sat))
tbl_imat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_imat, tbl_ppm1d_imat, tbl_tet2_imat))

gt_tbl <- tbl_stack(list(tbl_muscle, tbl_vat, tbl_sat, tbl_imat), 
                    group_header = c("Muscle", "VAT",
                                     "SAT", "IMAT")) %>% 
  as_gt(#rownames_to_stub = TRUE
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_options(row_group.border.top.color = "black",
                  row_group.border.top.width = 3,
                  row_group.border.bottom.color = "darkgrey",
                  row_group.font.size = 15,
                  row_group.font.weight = "bold",
                  row_group.text_transform = "uppercase",
                  row_group.background.color = "grey")
gt_tbl
```


```{r forest plot uva OR inex}
forest_uva_ind <- 
  tbl_dnmt3a_muscle %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SMI")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SM") %>% mutate(Pred = "DNMT3A") %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_dnmt3a_vat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("VAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "DNMT3A")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_dnmt3a_sat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "DNMT3A")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_dnmt3a_imat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("IMAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "DNMT3A")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ppm1d_muscle %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SMI")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SM") %>% mutate(Pred = "PPM1D")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ppm1d_vat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("VAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "PPM1D")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ppm1d_sat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "PPM1D")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ppm1d_imat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("IMAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "PPM1D")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_tet2_muscle %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SMI")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SM") %>% mutate(Pred = "TET2")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_tet2_vat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("VAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "TET2")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_tet2_sat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "TET2")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_tet2_imat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("IMAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "TET2")) %>% 

  bind_rows(., tbl_ch_muscle_ind %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SMI")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SM") %>%  mutate(Pred = "CH")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ch_vat_ind %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("VAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT") %>%  mutate(Pred = "CH")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ch_sat_ind %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT") %>%  mutate(Pred = "CH")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ch_imat_ind %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("IMAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT") %>%  mutate(Pred = "CH")) %>% 
  
  separate(`95% CI`, into = c("lower", "upper"), sep = ", ") %>% 
  mutate_at(c("OR", "lower", "upper"), ~ as.numeric(.)) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = str_remove_all(Characteristic, " proportion| \\(index\\)")) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = factor(Characteristic, levels = c("IMAT", "VAT", 
                                                            "SAT", "SMI")))

forest_uva_ind <-
  forest_uva_ind %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y=Characteristic, x=OR, xmin=lower, xmax=upper, color = Characteristic == "CH")) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_errorbarh(height=.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=1, color='black', linetype='dashed', alpha=.5) +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_x_log10()+
  labs(y="") %>% 
  # theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
  #       axis.title.y = element_blank())
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")+
  facet_wrap(. ~ Pred, nrow = 1,
             scales = "free",
             strip.position = "top")
forest_uva_ind
# ggsave("Figures/Figure 2A Forest plot MVA OR model20260407.tiff",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 10,
#        height = 3, compression = "lzw"
#        )
```

#### MVA
```{r}
tbl_dnmt3a_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          smisdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for DNMT3A mutation")
tbl_dnmt3a_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_dnmt3a_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_dnmt3a_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_ppm1d_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          smisdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for PPM1D mutation")
tbl_ppm1d_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_ppm1d_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_ppm1d_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_tet2_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          smisdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for TET2 mutation")
tbl_tet2_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_tet2_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_tet2_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_muscle <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_muscle, tbl_ppm1d_muscle, tbl_tet2_muscle), 
                        tab_spanner = c("Regression for DNMT3A mutation", 
                                        "Regression for PPM1D mutation", 
                                        "Regression for TET2 mutation"))
tbl_vat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_vat, tbl_ppm1d_vat, tbl_tet2_vat))
tbl_sat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_sat, tbl_ppm1d_sat, tbl_tet2_sat))
tbl_imat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_imat, tbl_ppm1d_imat, tbl_tet2_imat))

gt_tbl <- tbl_stack(list(tbl_muscle, tbl_vat, tbl_sat, tbl_imat), 
                    group_header = c("Muscle", "VAT",
                                     "SAT", "IMAT")) %>% 
  as_gt(#rownames_to_stub = TRUE
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_options(row_group.border.top.color = "black",
                  row_group.border.top.width = 3,
                  row_group.border.bottom.color = "darkgrey",
                  row_group.font.size = 15,
                  row_group.font.weight = "bold",
                  row_group.text_transform = "uppercase",
                  row_group.background.color = "grey")
gt_tbl
```

### d. Association with body composition proportion
Association estimates are reported per 1-SD increase in the body composition metric.   
#### UVA
```{r}
tbl_dnmt3a_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
          muscle_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>% 
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for DNMT3A mutation")
tbl_dnmt3a_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
          vat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_dnmt3a_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
          sat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_dnmt3a_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
          imat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_ppm1d_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
          muscle_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>% 
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for PPM1D mutation")
tbl_ppm1d_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
          vat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_ppm1d_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
          sat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_ppm1d_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
          imat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_tet2_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
          muscle_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>% 
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for TET2 mutation")
tbl_tet2_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
          vat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_tet2_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
          sat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_tet2_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
          imat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_muscle <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_muscle, tbl_ppm1d_muscle, tbl_tet2_muscle), 
                        tab_spanner = c("Regression for DNMT3A mutation", 
                                        "Regression for PPM1D mutation", 
                                        "Regression for TET2 mutation"))
tbl_vat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_vat, tbl_ppm1d_vat, tbl_tet2_vat))
tbl_sat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_sat, tbl_ppm1d_sat, tbl_tet2_sat))
tbl_imat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_imat, tbl_ppm1d_imat, tbl_tet2_imat))

gt_tbl <- tbl_stack(list(tbl_muscle, tbl_vat, tbl_sat, tbl_imat), 
                    group_header = c("Muscle", "VAT",
                                     "SAT", "IMAT")) %>% 
  as_gt(#rownames_to_stub = TRUE
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_options(row_group.border.top.color = "black",
                  row_group.border.top.width = 3,
                  row_group.border.bottom.color = "darkgrey",
                  row_group.font.size = 15,
                  row_group.font.weight = "bold",
                  row_group.text_transform = "uppercase",
                  row_group.background.color = "grey")
gt_tbl
```

```{r forest plot uva OR proportion}
forest_uva_prop <- 
  tbl_dnmt3a_muscle %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("Muscle proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SM") %>% mutate(Pred = "DNMT3A") %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_dnmt3a_vat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("VAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "DNMT3A")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_dnmt3a_sat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "DNMT3A")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_dnmt3a_imat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("IMAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "DNMT3A")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ppm1d_muscle %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("Muscle proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SM") %>% mutate(Pred = "PPM1D")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ppm1d_vat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("VAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "PPM1D")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ppm1d_sat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "PPM1D")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ppm1d_imat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("IMAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "PPM1D")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_tet2_muscle %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("Muscle proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SM") %>% mutate(Pred = "TET2")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_tet2_vat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("VAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "TET2")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_tet2_sat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "TET2")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_tet2_imat %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("IMAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT") %>% mutate(Pred = "TET2")) %>% 

  bind_rows(., tbl_ch_muscle_prop %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("Muscle proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SM") %>%  mutate(Pred = "CH")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ch_vat_prop %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("VAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT") %>%  mutate(Pred = "CH")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ch_sat_prop %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("SAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT") %>%  mutate(Pred = "CH")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_ch_imat_prop %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("IMAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT") %>%  mutate(Pred = "CH")) %>% 
  
  separate(`95% CI`, into = c("lower", "upper"), sep = ", ") %>% 
  mutate_at(c("OR", "lower", "upper"), ~ as.numeric(.)) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = str_remove_all(Characteristic, " proportion| \\(index\\)")) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = factor(Characteristic, levels = c("IMAT", "VAT", 
                                                            "SAT", "Muscle")))

forest_uva_prop <-
  forest_uva_prop %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y=Characteristic, x=OR, xmin=lower, xmax=upper, color = Characteristic == "CH")) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_errorbarh(height=.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=1, color='black', linetype='dashed', alpha=.5) +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_x_log10()+
  labs(y="") %>% 
  # theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
  #       axis.title.y = element_blank())
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")+
  facet_wrap(. ~ Pred, nrow = 1,
             scales = "free",
             strip.position = "top")
forest_uva_prop
# ggsave("Figures/Figure 2B Forest plot MVA OR model20260407.tiff",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 10,
#        height = 3, compression = "lzw"
#        )
```

#### MVA
```{r}
tbl_dnmt3a_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          muscle_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>% 
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for DNMT3A mutation")
tbl_dnmt3a_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          vat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_dnmt3a_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          sat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_dnmt3a_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_DNMT3A ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          imat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_ppm1d_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          muscle_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>% 
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for PPM1D mutation")
tbl_ppm1d_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          vat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_ppm1d_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          sat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_ppm1d_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_PPM1D ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          imat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_tet2_muscle <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          muscle_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p() %>% 
  modify_spanning_header(everything() ~ "Regression for TET2 mutation")
tbl_tet2_vat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          vat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_tet2_sat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          sat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()
tbl_tet2_imat <- glm(mutation_gene_TET2 ~
      age_at_diagnosis_num + sex + race +
          imat_proportionsdhr,
    family = "binomial",
    data = lymphoma_data) %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE,
                 intercept = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p()

tbl_muscle <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_muscle, tbl_ppm1d_muscle, tbl_tet2_muscle), 
                        tab_spanner = c("Regression for DNMT3A mutation", 
                                        "Regression for PPM1D mutation", 
                                        "Regression for TET2 mutation"))
tbl_vat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_vat, tbl_ppm1d_vat, tbl_tet2_vat))
tbl_sat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_sat, tbl_ppm1d_sat, tbl_tet2_sat))
tbl_imat <- tbl_merge(list(tbl_dnmt3a_imat, tbl_ppm1d_imat, tbl_tet2_imat))

gt_tbl <- tbl_stack(list(tbl_muscle, tbl_vat, tbl_sat, tbl_imat), 
                    group_header = c("Muscle", "VAT",
                                     "SAT", "IMAT")) %>% 
  as_gt(#rownames_to_stub = TRUE
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_options(row_group.border.top.color = "black",
                  row_group.border.top.width = 3,
                  row_group.border.bottom.color = "darkgrey",
                  row_group.font.size = 15,
                  row_group.font.weight = "bold",
                  row_group.text_transform = "uppercase",
                  row_group.background.color = "grey")
gt_tbl
```

## 3. Regression for association with CH variants mutations
### Count table - Ns are too snmall to do further regression
```{r}
lymphoma_data %>%
  select(starts_with("mutation_variant")) %>%
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "mutation_variant_")) %>% 
  tbl_summary() %>%
  bold_labels() %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**CH mutations**",
                all_stat_cols() ~ "**{level}**, N = {n}")
```

# V. Sensitivity analysis restricted to White patient (to follow when we decide which model to move forward)
```{r}
restric_white_patient <- lymphoma_data %>% 
  filter(race == "White")
```



<br>

# VI. Survival
## Univariable regression analysis
Association estimates are reported per 1-SD increase in the body composition metric.

## Univariable
```{r HR uva cox clinical}
tbl_main_surv <- tbl_uvregression(
  lymphoma_data,
  method = coxph,
  y = Surv(time = os_time_from_treatment_months, event = os_event),
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  include = c("age_at_diagnosis_num",
              "sex",
              "race",
              "ch_status",
              "bmi", "bmi_cat")) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>%
  bold_labels() %>% italicize_levels()
# tbl_main_surv
```



```{r HR uva cox BC}
# tbl_raw <- tbl_uvregression(
#   lymphoma_data,
#   method = coxph,
#   y = Surv(time = os_time_from_treatment_months, event = os_event),
#   exponentiate = TRUE,
#   include = c("imat_cm2", "vat_cm2", "sat_cm2",
#               "muscle_hu", "myosteatosis",
#               "v_s_ratio", "tat_cm2"
#               )) %>%
#   bold_p(t = .05) %>%
#   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>%
#   bold_labels() %>% italicize_levels()

# tbl_sdhr <- tbl_uvregression(
#   lymphoma_data,
#   method = coxph,
#   y = Surv(time = os_time_from_treatment_months, event = os_event),
#   exponentiate = TRUE,
#   include = c("vat_cm2_sdhr", "sat_cm2_sdhr", "imat_cm2_sdhr"
#               )) %>%
#   bold_p(t = .05) %>%
#   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>%
#   bold_labels() %>% italicize_levels()

# tbl_index <- tbl_uvregression(
#   lymphoma_data,
#   method = coxph,
#   y = Surv(time = os_time_from_treatment_months, event = os_event),
#   exponentiate = TRUE,
#   include = c("smi", "sarcopenia",
#               "imat_cm2_index", "vat_cm2_index", "sat_cm2_index"
#               )) %>%
#   bold_p(t = .05) %>%
#   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>%
#   bold_labels() %>% italicize_levels()
tbl_indexsdhr_surv <- tbl_uvregression(
  lymphoma_data,
  method = coxph,
  y = Surv(time = os_time_from_treatment_months, event = os_event),
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  include = c("smisdhr",
              "sarcopenia", 
              "muscle_hu_sdhr", "myosteatosis",
              "vat_cm2_indexsdhr", "sat_cm2_indexsdhr",
              "imat_cm2_indexsdhr", "tat_cm2_indexsdhr",
              )) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>%
  bold_labels() %>% italicize_levels()

# tbl_prop <- tbl_uvregression(
#   lymphoma_data,
#   method = coxph,
#   y = Surv(time = os_time_from_treatment_months, event = os_event),
#   exponentiate = TRUE,
#   include = c("muscle_proportion", "imat_proportion", "vat_proportion", "sat_proportion"
#               )) %>%
#   bold_p(t = .05) %>%
#   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>%
#   bold_labels() %>% italicize_levels()
tbl_propsdhr_surv <- tbl_uvregression(
  lymphoma_data,
  method = coxph,
  y = Surv(time = os_time_from_treatment_months, event = os_event),
  exponentiate = TRUE,
  include = c("muscle_proportionsdhr", "vat_proportionsdhr", "sat_proportionsdhr", "imat_proportionsdhr"
              )) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>%
  bold_labels() %>% italicize_levels()

# tbl_cat <- tbl_uvregression(
#   lymphoma_data,
#   method = coxph,
#   y = Surv(time = os_time_from_treatment_months, event = os_event),
#   exponentiate = TRUE,
#   include = c("smi_tertcat", "imat_cm2_index_tertcat", "vat_cm2_index_tertcat", "sat_cm2_index_tertcat",
#               "v_s_ratio_tertcat", "tat_cm2_tertcat",
#               "muscle_proportion_tertcat", "imat_proportion_tertcat", "vat_proportion_tertcat", "sat_proportion_tertcat")) %>%
#   bold_p(t = .05) %>%
#   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>%
#   bold_labels() %>% italicize_levels()

```

```{r gt table uva}
gt_tbl <- tbl_stack(list(tbl_main_surv, tbl_indexsdhr_surv, tbl_propsdhr_surv), 
                    group_header = c("Clinical", 
                                     "1-SD normalized Indexed features",
                                     "1-SD normalized Tissue proportion")) %>%
  as_gt(#rownames_to_stub = TRUE
  ) %>%
  gt::tab_options(row_group.border.top.color = "black",
                  row_group.border.top.width = 3,
                  row_group.border.bottom.color = "darkgrey",
                  row_group.font.size = 15,
                  row_group.font.weight = "bold",
                  row_group.text_transform = "uppercase",
                  row_group.background.color = "grey")
gt_tbl
```


## Multivariable
## MVA BMI
```{r HR mva bmi}
coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + bmi,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>% 
  modify_table_styling(
    columns = estimate,
    rows = reference_row %in% TRUE,
    missing_symbol = "Reference"
  ) %>%
  modify_column_merge(
    pattern = "{stat_n} ({stat_nevent})",
    rows = !is.na(stat_nevent)
  ) %>%
  modify_header(stat_n = "**N (Event N)**") %>% 
  # merge all info
  modify_column_merge(
    pattern = "{estimate} ({conf.low}-{conf.high}; p={p.value})",
    rows = !is.na(estimate)
  ) %>%
  remove_abbreviation()

coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + bmi_cat,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>% 
  modify_table_styling(
    columns = estimate,
    rows = reference_row %in% TRUE,
    missing_symbol = "Reference"
  ) %>%
  modify_column_merge(
    pattern = "{stat_n} ({stat_nevent})",
    rows = !is.na(stat_nevent)
  ) %>%
  modify_header(stat_n = "**N (Event N)**") %>% 
  # merge all info
  modify_column_merge(
    pattern = "{estimate} ({conf.low}-{conf.high}; p={p.value})",
    rows = !is.na(estimate)
  ) %>%
  remove_abbreviation()
```

```{r}
tbl_1_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**MVA Indexed**")
tbl_muscle_ind_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + smisdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
tbl_sat_ind_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + sat_cm2_indexsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
tbl_vat_ind_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + vat_cm2_indexsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
tbl_imat_ind_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
tbl_all_ind_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + smisdhr + 
          sat_cm2_indexsdhr +
          vat_cm2_indexsdhr + imat_cm2_indexsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")

tbl_merge(list(tbl_1_surv, tbl_muscle_ind_surv, tbl_sat_ind_surv, tbl_vat_ind_surv,
               tbl_imat_ind_surv, tbl_all_ind_surv),
          tab_spanner = c("**Multivariable \nClinical only  = 'Reduced model'**",
                          "**Multivariable \nSingle BC model SM**",
                          "**Multivariable \nSingle BC model SAT**",
                          "**Multivariable \nSingle BC model VAT**",
                          "**Multivariable \nSingle BC model IMAT**",
                          "**Multivariable \nFull model 4 metrics**"
                          ))
```
<br>

```{r}
tbl_1_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") %>% 
  modify_header(label ~ "**MVA Proportion**")
tbl_muscle_prop_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + muscle_proportionsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
tbl_sat_prop_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + sat_proportionsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
tbl_vat_prop_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + vat_proportionsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
tbl_imat_prop_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + imat_proportionsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
tbl_all_prop_surv <-
  coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + 
          sat_proportionsdhr +
          vat_proportionsdhr + imat_proportionsdhr + muscle_proportionsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")

tbl_merge(list(tbl_1_surv, tbl_muscle_prop_surv, tbl_sat_prop_surv, tbl_vat_prop_surv,
               tbl_imat_prop_surv, tbl_all_prop_surv),
          tab_spanner = c("**Multivariable \nClinical only  = 'Reduced model'**",
                          "**Multivariable \nSingle BC model SM**",
                          "**Multivariable \nSingle BC model SAT**",
                          "**Multivariable \nSingle BC model VAT**",
                          "**Multivariable \nSingle BC model IMAT**",
                          "**Multivariable \nFull model 4 metric**"
                          ))
```
<br>

## Forest plot
```{r forest plot mva HR index}
forest_mva_ind_surv <- 
  tbl_muscle_ind_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","SMI")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SMI") %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_sat_ind_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","SAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_vat_ind_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","VAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_imat_ind_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","IMAT (index)")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT")) %>% 
  separate(`95% CI`, into = c("lower", "upper"), sep = ", ") %>% 
  mutate_at(c("HR", "lower", "upper"), ~ as.numeric(.)) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = str_remove_all(Characteristic, " proportion| \\(index\\)")) %>% 
  mutate(model = factor(model, levels = c("SMI", "SAT",
                                          "VAT", "IMAT")))

forest_mva_ind_surv <- forest_mva_ind_surv %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y=Characteristic, x=HR, xmin=lower, xmax=upper, color = Characteristic == "CH")) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_errorbarh(height=.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=1, color='black', linetype='dashed', alpha=.5) +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_x_log10()+
  labs(y="") %>% 
  # theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
  #       axis.title.y = element_blank())
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")+
  facet_wrap(. ~ model, ncol = 1,
             scales = "free",
             strip.position = "right")
forest_mva_ind_surv
# ggsave("Figures/Figure 1A Forest plot MVA index BC model20260407.tiff",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 4,
#        height = 5, compression = "lzw"
#        )
```

```{r forest plot mva HR proportion}
forest_mva_prop_surv <- 
  tbl_muscle_prop_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","Muscle proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SMI") %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_sat_prop_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","SAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "SAT")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_vat_prop_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","VAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "VAT")) %>% 
  
  bind_rows(., tbl_imat_prop_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","IMAT proportion")) %>%
  mutate(model = "IMAT")) %>% 
  separate(`95% CI`, into = c("lower", "upper"), sep = ", ") %>% 
  mutate_at(c("HR", "lower", "upper"), ~ as.numeric(.)) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = str_remove_all(Characteristic, " proportion| \\(index\\)")) %>% 
  mutate(model = factor(model, levels = c("SMI", "SAT",
                                          "VAT", "IMAT")))

forest_mva_prop_surv <- forest_mva_prop_surv %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y=Characteristic, x=HR, xmin=lower, xmax=upper, color = Characteristic == "CH")) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_errorbarh(height=.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=1, color='black', linetype='dashed', alpha=.5) +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_x_log10()+
  labs(y="") %>% 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")+
  facet_wrap(. ~ model, ncol = 1,
             scales = "free",
             strip.position = "right")
forest_mva_prop_surv
# ggsave("Figures/Figure 1B Forest plot MVA prop BC model20260407.tiff",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 4,
#        height = 5, compression = "lzw"
#        )
```


```{r}
forest_prop_surv <- 
  tbl_all_prop_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH","SAT proportion",
                               "VAT proportion",
                               "IMAT proportion") ) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = factor(Characteristic, 
                                 levels = c("IMAT proportion",
                                            "VAT proportion",
                                            "SAT proportion","CH"
                                 ))) %>% 
  separate(`95% CI`, into = c("lower", "upper"), sep = ", ") %>% 
  
  mutate_at(c("HR", "lower", "upper"), ~ as.numeric(.)) #%>% 
  # mutate(name= case_when(
  #   Characteristic == "High marrow burden (≥50%)"      ~ "High marrow \nburden (≥50%)",
  #   Characteristic == "gr3_cytopenia_-5d"      ~ "Grade ≥ 3 Cytopenia \nat Day -5",
  #   Characteristic == "Steroid Use"      ~ "Steroid use",
  #   Characteristic == "Number of prior lines of therapy"      ~ "Number of prior \nlines of therapy",
  #   Characteristic == "baseline_ferritin_cat"      ~ "Baseline ferritin"
  # ))

forest_prop_surv_fig <- forest_prop_surv %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y=Characteristic, x=HR, xmin=lower, xmax=upper, color = Characteristic == "CH")) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_errorbarh(height=.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=1, color='black', linetype='dashed', alpha=.5) +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_x_log10()+
  labs(y="") %>% 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
forest_prop_surv_fig

# ggsave("Figures/Figure 1D Forest plot MVA proportion full model20260407.tiff",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 6,
#        height = 5, compression = "lzw"
#        )

forest_ind_surv <- 
  tbl_all_ind_surv %>%
  as_tibble() %>% 
  `colnames<-`(str_remove_all(colnames(.), "\\*")) %>% 
  filter(Characteristic %in% c("CH", "SMI", "SAT (index)",
                               "VAT (index)",
                               "IMAT (index)") ) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = factor(Characteristic, 
                                 levels = c("IMAT (index)",
```
