```{r}
                                            "VAT (index)",
                                            "SAT (index)",
                                            "SMI", "CH"
                                 ))) %>% 
  separate(`95% CI`, into = c("lower", "upper"), sep = ", ") %>% 
  
  mutate_at(c("HR", "lower", "upper"), ~ as.numeric(.))

forest_ind_fig_surv <- forest_ind_surv %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y=Characteristic, x=HR, xmin=lower, xmax=upper, color = Characteristic == "CH")) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_errorbarh(height=.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=1, color='black', linetype='dashed', alpha=.5) +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_x_log10()+
  labs(y="") %>% 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")
forest_ind_fig_surv

# ggsave("Figures/Figure 1C Forest plot MVA indexed full model20260407.tiff",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 6,
#        height = 5, compression = "lzw"
#        )

forest_surv_fullmva <- 
  forest_prop_surv %>%
  mutate(approach = "Proportion") %>% 
  bind_rows(., forest_ind_surv %>%
  mutate(approach = "Indexed")) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = str_remove_all(Characteristic, " proportion| \\(index\\)")) %>% 
  mutate(Characteristic = factor(Characteristic, 
                                 levels = c("IMAT",
                                            "VAT",
                                            "SAT",
                                            "SMI", "CH"
                                 ))) %>% 
  ggplot(aes(y=Characteristic, x=HR, xmin=lower, xmax=upper, color = Characteristic == "CH")) +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_errorbarh(height=.1) +
  geom_vline(xintercept=1, color='black', linetype='dashed', alpha=.5) +
  theme_classic()+
  scale_x_log10()+
  labs(y="") %>% 
  theme(text = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(), legend.position = "none")+
  facet_wrap(. ~ approach, axes = "all",
             # scales = "free_x",
             strip.position = "right")
forest_surv_fullmva

# ggsave("Figures/Figure 1 C-D Forest plot MVA full model20260407.tiff",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 6,
#        height = 5, compression = "lzw"
#        )
```

```{r patchwork HR forest}
library(patchwork)

forest_mva_ind_surv <- forest_mva_ind_surv +
  labs(subtitle = 'Indexed')
forest_mva_prop_surv <- forest_mva_prop_surv +
  labs(subtitle = 'Proportion')

(forest_mva_ind_surv + forest_mva_prop_surv) /
  (forest_surv_fullmva) + plot_annotation(tag_levels = 'A')+
  plot_layout(heights = unit(c(2, 1), c('null', 'null')))

# ggsave("Figures/Figure 1 Forest plot20260407.tiff",
#        dpi = 600, units = "in",
#        width = 8,
#        height = 6, compression = "lzw"
#        )
```
<br>















Other
```{r}
coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + tat_cm2_indexsdhr,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + v_s_ratio,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + visceral_obesity,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")

coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + sarcopenia,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
             event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
          sex + ch_status + myosteatosis,
        data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
  tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
  bold_p(t = .05) %>%
  add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
```



```{r}
# tbl_3 <-
#   coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
#              event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
#           sex + ch_status +

#         data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
#   tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
#   bold_p(t = .05) %>%
#   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")

#              event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
#           sex + ch_status +
#           muscle_proportion + vat_proportion + sat_proportion + imat_proportion,
#         data = lymphoma_data)  %>%

#   bold_p(t = .05) %>%
#   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
#

# tbl_merge(list(tbl_3, tbl_4), tab_spanner = c("**Multivariable \nBody Comp \nIndexed**",
#                                               "**Multivariable \nBody Comp \nProportion**"))
# 
# coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months,
#              event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num +
#           sex + ch_status +
#           v_s_ratio_tertcat,
#         data = lymphoma_data)  %>%
#   tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
#   bold_p(t = .05) %>%
#   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level")
```

<!-- Additionally adjusted by BMI -->
<!-- ```{r} -->
<!-- coxph(Surv(time = lymphoma_data$os_time_from_treatment_months, -->
<!--              event = lymphoma_data$os_event) ~ age_at_diagnosis_num + -->
<!--           sex + race + ch_status + -->
<!--           muscle_proportion + vat_proportion + sat_proportion + imat_proportion +  -->
<!--         bmi, -->
<!--         data = lymphoma_data)  %>% -->
<!--   tbl_regression(exponentiate = TRUE) %>% -->
<!--   bold_p(t = .05) %>% -->
<!--   add_nevent(location = "level") %>% add_n(location = "level") -->

<!-- ``` -->

## KM by CH
```{r KM OS by CH}
ggsurvplot(survfit(Surv(os_time_from_treatment_months, os_event) ~ ch_status,
                   data = lymphoma_data),
           # title = "PFS Analysis",
           font.main = c(20, "bold", "black"),
           font.x = c(18, "bold", "black"),
           font.y = c(18, "bold", "black"),
           font.legend = c(16, "black"),
           font.tickslab = c(16, "bold", "black"),
           size = 1.5,

           xlab = "Time (months)",
           legend = "top",
           pval = TRUE,
           conf.int = FALSE,
           # Censor
           censor = TRUE
) %++% guides(colour = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
```


<br>

# L-CH
```{r}
lymphoma_data %>% 
  filter(patient_l_ch == "L-CH") %>% 
  inner_join(., ch_mutation) %>% 
  select(mrn, gene, variant_p, os_event, os_time_from_treatment_months, sex, race, ethnicity_src_desc, myosteatosis, sarcopenia, bmi)
```



***

sessionInfo available in Readme file

```{r}
sessionInfo() %>% capture.output(file="readme_sessioninfo.txt")
```
